description: 13 more Russian shadow fleet vessels struck in Azov Sea and Black Sea over last 2 days, Ukraine says. The 13 vessels that were struck over July 21-22 included 10 dry cargo ships, two tugboats, and a tanker, according to Brovdi.

description: The order of further steps was determined. Decisions regarding the replacement of the leadership of the Armed Forces of Ukraine will be formalized today - relevant decrees are being prepared. Together with Mykhailo Drapaty and Yevgeny Khmara, they determined that the new Chief of the General Staff of the Armed Forces of Ukraine will be Major General Ihor Skybyuk - a very experienced military man, with whom the new Commander-in-Chief defended Ukraine side by side. Importantly,...
description_en: The order of further steps was determined. Decisions regarding the replacement of the leadership of the Armed Forces of Ukraine will be formalized today - relevant decrees are being prepared. Together with Mykhailo Drapaty and Yevgeny Khmara, they determined that the new Chief of the General Staff of the Armed Forces of Ukraine will be Major General Ihor Skybyuk - a very experienced military man, with whom the new Commander-in-Chief defended Ukraine side by side. Importantly,...
description_uk: Визначили порядок подальших кроків. Сьогодні будуть формалізовані рішення щодо заміни керівництва Збройних Сил України – відповідні укази готуються. Разом із Михайлом Драпатим та Євгенієм Хмарою визначили, що новим начальником Генерального штабу Збройних Сил України стане генерал-майор Ігор Скибюк – дуже досвідчений військовий, із яким новий Головнокомандувач пліч-о-пліч захищав Україну. title: Explosions reported
title_en: Explosions reported
description: Drones attacked one of the largest logistics warehouses of Wildberries in Russia. Eyewitnesses heard 20-30 explosions, and the siren was turned on after the incident "for two minutes, and then turned off." It is also reported that employees of the logistics center were evacuated after a series of explosions. Reuters writes that many people throughout the Russian Federation will most likely feel any long-term disruption of Wildberries. Having...
description_en: Drones attacked one of the largest logistics warehouses of Wildberries in Russia. Eyewitnesses heard 20-30 explosions, and the siren was turned on after the incident "for two minutes, and then turned off." It is also reported that employees of the logistics center were evacuated after a series of explosions. Reuters writes that many people throughout the Russian Federation will most likely feel any long-term disruption of Wildberries. Having...
description_uk: Дроны атаковали один из крупнейших логистических складов Wildberries в России Очевидцы слышали 20–30 взрывов, а сирену включили уже после инцидента "на две минуты, а затем выключили". Также сообщается, что сотрудников логистического центра эвакуировали после серии взрывов. Reuters пишет, что любое длительное нарушение работы Wildberries, скорее всего, почувствуют многие люди по всей РФ. Имея...

title: Crimea: Power outage reported
title_en: Crimea: Power outage reported
description: Massive fires in southern Russia, blackouts in occupied Crimea amid reported Ukrainian strikes. Blackouts were reported throughout occupied Crimea, and massive fires broke out in several southern Russian cities amid Ukrainian strikes on retail logistics facilities overnight on July 22, according to monitoring channels.
description_en: Massive fires in southern Russia, blackouts in occupied Crimea amid reported Ukrainian strikes. Blackouts were reported throughout occupied Crimea, and massive fires broke out in several southern Russian cities amid Ukrainian strikes on retail logistics facilities overnight on July 22, according to monitoring channels.

description: Thanks to Ukraine's new strategy, Russia's grip on Crimea is crumbling “In its months-long campaign to strangle Russia’s hold on Crimea, starving the peninsula of fuel and forcing Russians to flee en masse, Ukraine has finally killed off the idea that Crimea is some kind of "special" or "holy" place for Russians,” writes Casey Michel, Director of the Combating Kleptocracy Program, in his op-ed....

title: Kyiv: 🇬🇧 The head of the Ministry of Foreign Affairs of Ukraine Andriy...
title_en: Kyiv: 🇬🇧 The head of the Ministry of Foreign Affairs of Ukraine Andriy...
description: 🇬🇧 The head of the Ministry of Foreign Affairs of Ukraine Andriy Sybiga held the first telephone conversation with the newly appointed Secretary of State for Foreign Affairs of Great Britain Ed Miliband. Andriy Sybiga congratulated him on his appointment and thanked Great Britain for its steadfast support of Ukraine since the first days of the full-scale invasion of Russia, in particular for military, energy, humanitarian, economic and sanctions...
description_en: 🇬🇧 The head of the Ministry of Foreign Affairs of Ukraine Andriy Sybiga held the first telephone conversation with the newly appointed Secretary of State for Foreign Affairs of Great Britain Ed Miliband. Andriy Sybiga congratulated him on his appointment and thanked Great Britain for its steadfast support of Ukraine since the first days of the full-scale invasion of Russia, in particular for military, energy, humanitarian, economic and sanctions...
description_uk: 🇬🇧 Очільник МЗС України Андрій Сибіга провів першу телефонну розмову з новопризначеним державним секретарем у закордонних справах Великої Британії Едом Мілібендом. Андрій Сибіга привітав його з призначенням на посаду та подякував Великій Британії за непохитну підтримку України з перших днів повномасштабного вторгнення Росії, зокрема за військову, енергетичну, гуманітарну, економічну та санкційну...

title: Air defense active
title_en: Air defense active
description: Almost half of the Russian "Lightning" drones were destroyed by the interceptors of the "General Chereshnia" company in June. In June 2026, the interceptor drones of the Ukrainian company "General Chereshnia" destroyed more than 13 thousand Russian "Lightning" drones, which is 43% of all the confirmed defeats of these drones in a month. It follows that almost every second destroyed "Lightning" drone was intercepted precisely...
description_en: Almost half of the Russian "Lightning" drones were destroyed by the interceptors of the "General Chereshnia" company in June. In June 2026, the interceptor drones of the Ukrainian company "General Chereshnia" destroyed more than 13 thousand Russian "Lightning" drones, which is 43% of all the confirmed defeats of these drones in a month. It follows that almost every second destroyed "Lightning" drone was intercepted precisely...
description_uk: Почти половину российских дронов "Молния" в июне уничтожили перехватчики компании "Генерал Черешня" Дроны-перехватчики украинской компании "Генерал Черешня" в июне 2026 года уничтожили более 13 тысяч российских беспилотников "Молния", что составляет 43% от всех подтвержденных поражений этих дронов за месяц. Из этого следует, что почти каждый второй уничтоженный дрон "Молния" был перехвачен именно...

title: Airstrike attack
title_en: Airstrike attack
description: 💬 The head of the Ministry of Foreign Affairs of Ukraine, Andriy Sybiga, reacted to Russia's attack on the Gas Lisbon vessel near Romania: "Russian war threatens not only Ukraine, but also poses a direct threat to freedom of navigation, maritime security in the Black Sea and NATO's eastern flank. The deliberate attack on the LPG tanker Gas Lisbon, which was headed for Ukraine and was attacked near the coast of Romania, is another example of Russian...

The deliberate attack on the LPG tanker Gas Lisbon, which was headed for Ukraine and was attacked near the coast of Romania, is another example of Russian...
description_uk: 💬 Очільник МЗС України Андрій Сибіга відреагував на удар Росії по судну Gas Lisbon неподалік Румунії: "Російська війна загрожує не лише України, але й становить пряму загрозу свободі судноплавства, морській безпеці в Чорному морі та східному флангу НАТО. Навмисний напад на LPG-танкер Gas Lisbon, який прямував до України й був атакований поблизу узбережжя Румунії, є черговим прикладом російського...

title: 🇬🇧 Andy Burnham became the new head of His Majesty's government, Keir...
title_en: 🇬🇧 Andy Burnham became the new head of His Majesty's government, Keir...
title_uk: 🇬🇧 Енді Бернем став новим головою уряду Його Величності Кейра...
description: 🇬🇧 Andy Burnham became the new head of His Majesty's government, Keir Starmer officially left the post of Prime Minister of Great Britain 👥 King Charles III accepted Starmer's resignation and officially appointed Burnham as the head of the government. 💬 Earlier, Burnham stated that he would maintain the current level of support for Ukraine. He also stressed that Great Britain lives in an increasingly dangerous world
description_en: 🇬🇧 Andy Burnham became the new head of His Majesty's government, Keir Starmer officially left the post of Prime Minister of Great Britain 👥 King Charles III accepted Starmer's resignation and officially appointed Burnham as the head of the government. 💬 Earlier, Burnham stated that he would maintain the current level of support for Ukraine. He also stressed that Great Britain lives in an increasingly dangerous world
description_uk: 🇬🇧 Новим головою уряду Його Величності став Енді Бернем, Кір Стармер офіційно залишив посаду прем’єр-міністра Великої Британії 👥 Король Чарльз III прийняв відставку Стармера та офіційно призначив Бернема главою уряду. 💬 Раніше Бернем заявив, що збереже нинішній рівень підтримки України. Він також наголошував, що Велика Британія живе у дедалі небезпечнішому світі
